LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Approved.stages.0.descriptio: I was in a land vehicle. I loved it.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Approved.stages.0.label: drove a land vehicle
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Horrible.stages.0.descriptio: I was in a land vehicle. It was horrible.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Horrible.stages.0.label: drove a land vehicle
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.0.descriptio: It has been a lil while since I've been at the wheel of a land vehicle.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.0.label: roadrage (more than 1 day)
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.1.descriptio: I need to drive, I'm getting very antsy.
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.1.label: roadrage (more than 5 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.2.descriptio: Enough is enough, I'm feeling the call of the road! I want to drive!
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.2.label: roadrage (more than 10 days)
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.3.descriptio: I AM THE ONE THAT RUNS FROM BOTH THE LIVING AND THE DEAD! GIVE ME MY CAR!
LanguageData.VVE_Driving_Required.stages.3.label: roadrage (more than 20 days)
